product: NetApp ONTAP REST API — application consistency-group reconciliation

auth.note: sent on every request; credentials never appear in rendered errors

success.body: complete document; carries fields the reconciler does not own (space, _tags, replication_relationships, uuids) which must be preserved untouched in the report and never echoed into a write

body.name: <cg name>
body.qos: {policy: {name}} — omitted entirely when the spec manages no QoS policy

request.body: ONLY drifted owned fields: volumes (missing ones with provisioning_options action add) and/or qos.policy.name; never name, svm, or any unknown field

update.note: PATCH cannot remove elements (documented error 262285); volumes present on the group but absent from the spec are left alone and never trigger a write

poll_job.pacing: injected sleep(1s) before every poll except the first; MaxPolls bounds polls per job and exhausting it yields an error containing 'poll budget' and the bound

conflict_semantics.note: ONTAP documents no ETag/If-Match for consistency groups (catalog correction); conflicts are error codes
conflict_semantics.create_race: POST job failure with error.code 53411860 means another writer created the group: restart once (re-list by name, adopt the uuid, continue on the update path)
conflict_semantics.instance_vanished: instance GET 404 with error.code 53411842 means the group disappeared between list and read: restart once from the list
conflict_semantics.restart_budget: at most one restart per reconcile; a second restartable condition yields an error containing 'restart budget'
conflict_semantics.patch_conflict: PATCH job failure (e.g. 53411853 conflicting fields) is surfaced as *JobError with code and message; no retry

errors.client_rule: non-2xx responses become *APIError{Status, Code, Message, Target}; job failures become *JobError{UUID, Code, Message}
